title: Whimscape x Chest Search Bar
description: Unofficial add-on for Whimscape & Chest Search Bar.
body:
## About > This is my attempt at applying the [**Whimscape**](https://modrinth.com/project/4YkvO5Rp) theme onto the [**Chest Search Bar**](https://modrinth.com/project/FqlAuAzY) mod since I use them both in almost every minecraft instance I play.

## Related Projects > Technically some of these are _required_ but I thought I wanted a section to promote other's work alongside mine.

> You can also [**Check out my other Whimscape compatibility work!**](https://modrinth.com/collection/U9BXDFq6)

## Author's Note > This was a very simple retexture but It's the little things that make the big difference :) > Feel free to add this to your modpack as long as proper credit is given :) > If you want to use the resources, I ask that you give proper credit as well as respect the project's license!
